data.content:
hardware,system organization	I/O Device
I/O System
I/O Devices are integral components managed by the I/O System for data exchange.

data transfer,interface method,interface type,type	I/O Interface
Parallel Interface
Parallel Interface is a type of I/O Interface facilitating multi-bit simultaneous data transfer.<SEP>Parallel interface is a type of I/O interface for simultaneous transmission of multiple bits.

component,composition,connection,controller part	Host Interface
I/O Controller
Host Interface is a core component of the I/O Controller for interfacing with the central system.<SEP>Host interface is a part of the I/O controller connecting to the system or CPU.

category,device status	I/O Port
Status Port
Status port is a category of I/O port for status monitoring.

architecture,subsystem	I/O Channel
I/O System
I/O Channels are used within the I

component,composition,controller part,device connection	Device Interface
I/O Controller
Device Interface is a subcomponent of the I/O Controller for connecting to I/O devices.<SEP>Device interface is a part of the I/O controller connecting to the I/O device.

data transfer,interface method,interface type,type	I/O Interface
Serial Interface
Serial Interface is a type of I/O Interface facilitating sequential, bit-by-bit communication.<SEP>Serial interface is a type of I/O interface for sequential transmission of data.

data transfer,type	I/O Channel
Selector Channel
Selector channel is a type of I/O channel dedicated to a single device.

category,device classification	I/O Device
Input Device
Input Devices are a subtype of I/O Devices designed for data input.

component,connection	Data Port
I/O Interface
Data Port serves as a part of the I/O Interface for sending or receiving data.

component,composition,control function,operation management	Control Logic
I/O Controller
Control Logic is implemented within the I/O Controller to manage its operations.<SEP>Control logic in the I/O controller manages and coordinates all operations of the controller's interfaces.

data transfer,type	I/O Channel
Multiplexer Channel
Multiplexer channel is a type of I/O channel capable of handling multiple devices.

category,data transfer	Data Port
I/O Port
Data port is a category of I/O port designated for the transmission of data.

component,connection	I/O Interface
Status Port
Status Port is included in the I/O Interface for device status reporting.

category,device classification	I/O Device
Output Device
Output Devices are a subtype of I/O Devices used for data output.

component,connection	Control Port
I/O Interface
Control Port is a functional part of the I/O Interface for command and control signals.

category,device classification	I/O Device
Input/Output Device
Input/Output Devices are a subtype of I/O Devices capable of both input and output functions.

data handling,functionality	Buffered Operation
I/O Interface
Buffered operation is a function performed by I/O interfaces to match device and system speeds.

category,device control	Control Port
I/O Port
Control port is a category of I/O port used to transmit control commands.

classification,operational mode	Block Device
I/O Device
Block Devices represent one method of data management by I/O Devices.

functionality,monitoring	I/O Interface
Status Detection
Status detection is a monitoring function provided by I/O interfaces.

classification,operational mode	Character Device
I/O Device
Character Devices offer data handling as a sequential stream, distinguishing them from block devices.

addressing,functionality	Address Recognition
I/O Interface
Address recognition is used by I/O interfaces to identify correct devices or locations for data transfer.

classification,data rate	I/O Device
Low-Speed Device
Low-Speed Devices are categorized based on their slower data transfer rate.

data conversion,functionality	Data Format Conversion
I/O Interface
Data format conversion is a function that enables I/O interfaces to bridge different data formats between devices and the system.

classification,data rate	I/O Device
Medium-Speed Device
Medium-Speed Devices are categorized by moderate data transfer rate among I/O devices.

component,structure	Data Path
I/O Interface
Data path is a structural component of the I/O interface for data transfer.

classification,data rate	High-Speed Device
I/O Device
High-Speed Devices are those I/O devices supporting rapid data transfer.

component,signals	I/O Interface
Status/Control Path
Status/control path is a component of the I/O interface handling status and control signals.

addressing,component	Address Path
I/O Interface
Address path is a component of I/O interface used for addressing in data transactions.

communication,connectivity	I/O Device
I/O Interface
I/O Devices connect with the system via I/O Interfaces for information exchange.
